hero.name: Lounes Badji
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Dynamic software engineer with over 8 years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying high-performance web applications for e-commerce and financial services. Expert in JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, Node.js, and modern frameworks.

about.title: About Me
about.description: An engineering graduate from CPE Lyon in Computer Systems, Networks and Telecommunications, I am a Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience. Specialized in end-to-end development, system architecture optimization, and improving application scalability. I have worked for companies such as Louis Vuitton, Agicap, and Tessi.

tessi1.description: Leading and mentoring a team of 6 Front-End developers. Set up the NX monorepository, CI/CD with quality analysis, Storybook, automated API client integration, and Figma styles. Documented hexagonal architecture.

tessi2.description: Developed a SaaS solution for runtime business process monitoring. Created performance indicator visualization dashboards, a simulation engine, and a process tracker with debug actions.

globaz.description: Developed a SaaS solution for Swiss compensation funds. Set up NX and continuous delivery, created design system components, and trained teams in OOP and data structures.

agicap.description: Developed two new products: debt collection management and invoicing. Set up E2E testing with Cucumber and Playwright, DDD/TDD with hexagonal architecture. Led ORM selection and migration.

lv.description: Responsible for the production of the mobile application back-office. Reduced deployment time by 75% through a new branching model. Set up CI/CD quality gates, a UI-driven back-office, a mobile proxy, and an internal caching system.

mygladys.description: SaaS platform for professional appointment booking. Created a user data tracker, led API communication using OOP, and developed the client calendar and availability system.

icoges.description: Private higher education school. Created course content for the BTS program meeting academic requirements. Taught hybrid application development with Ionic and NestJS.

ubilab.description: SaaS platform for digitizing laboratories, clinics, and hospitals. Task estimation, product prototyping, built the e-learning module from scratch, and set up the CI/CD pipeline with GitHub and Jenkins.

trainme.description: SaaS platform for sport digitization. Developed a hybrid mobile application with Ionic, real-time messaging with social authentication, and calendar integration for sports professionals.

cpe.description: Graduate School of Chemistry, Physics, and Electronics of Lyon

items.frontend: TypeScript, JavaScript, Angular, React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Storybook, Ionic
items.backend: Node.js, NestJS, Java, Express, REST API, GraphQL
items.architecture: DDD, TDD, CQRS, Hexagonal Architecture, Microservices, Clean Architecture, Software Design, Nx
items.tools: Git, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker, CI/CD, Cucumber, Playwright, Jest, Cypress, Figma
items.soft: Technical Leadership, Mentoring, Agile Methodologies, Communication, Teamwork

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: Interested in my profile? Don't hesitate to reach out!

chatbot.title: Resume Assistant
chatbot.placeholder: Ask a question about my resume...
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm Lounes's assistant. Ask me about his background, skills, or experience!
chatbot.fallback: I'm not sure I understand your question. I can tell you about: career path, technical skills, education, companies (Louis Vuitton, Tessi, Agicap...), methodologies, leadership, or how to contact Lounes.

responses.experience: Lounes has over 8 years of experience. He is currently Technical Lead Frontend at Tessi since February 2024, where he leads a team of 6 developers. Previously: Frontend Developer at Tessi, GLOBAZ SA (Switzerland), Fullstack at Agicap, Head of Production at Louis Vuitton, Technical Lead at MyGladys and Ubilab, Instructor at ICOGES, and mobile internship at TrainMe.
responses.skills: Lounes is proficient in TypeScript, Angular, React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, and Java. Expert in hexagonal architecture, DDD, TDD, CQRS, and Nx. He uses Storybook, Cucumber, Playwright, Jest, Cypress, Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins.
responses.education: Lounes holds an engineering degree from CPE Lyon in Computer Systems, Networks and Telecommunications (2013-2016). He completed the preparatory program for Grandes Ecoles in Mathematics at Les Chartreux in Lyon (2011-2013).
responses.location: Lounes is based in Lyon, France.
responses.lv: At Louis Vuitton (Nov 2019 - Nov 2021), Lounes was Head of Production for the mobile back-office. He reduced deployment time by 75%, set up CI/CD quality gates, built a UI-driven back-office, a proxy for mobile data consumption, and an internal caching system.
responses.agicap: At Agicap (Nov 2021 - Aug 2022), Lounes developed two new products (debt collection and invoicing) as a Fullstack developer. He implemented DDD/TDD with hexagonal architecture, E2E testing with Cucumber and Playwright, and led ORM selection and migration.
responses.current: Currently, Lounes is Technical Lead Frontend at Tessi since February 2024. He leads a team of 6 developers and has set up the NX monorepository, hexagonal architecture, Storybook, and automated API integration and Figma styles.
responses.github: Lounes has 60+ repositories on GitHub. His profile is github.com/badjilounes.
responses.languages: Lounes primarily works with TypeScript, Angular, NestJS, and Nx. He speaks French (native) and English (B2 certification).
responses.teaching: Lounes was an Instructor at ICOGES (Feb 2018 - Feb 2019), a private higher education school. He created course content for the BTS program and taught hybrid application development with Ionic and NestJS.
responses.hello: Hello! I'm the virtual assistant of Lounes Badji, Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience. How can I help you?
responses.contact: You can contact Lounes by phone at (+33) 6 16 51 53 27, by email at lounesbadji@gmail.com, via LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/lounes-badji-01b550104), or GitHub (github.com/badjilounes). Don't hesitate to call or email him!
responses.cv: You can view and download Lounes's CV in PDF format directly from this site. Click the 'Download my CV' button at the top of the page, or access it here: /Lounes BADJI.pdf. For any questions, reach him at (+33) 6 16 51 53 27 or lounesbadji@gmail.com.
responses.strength: Lounes's key strengths: reduced deployment time by 75% at Louis Vuitton, leading a team of 6 developers at Tessi, expertise in hexagonal architecture/DDD/TDD, and setting up NX monorepo and CI/CD across multiple projects.
responses.availability: Lounes is currently employed at Tessi as Technical Lead Frontend. To discuss opportunities, contact him via LinkedIn or by email at lounesbadji@gmail.com.
responses.methodology: Lounes practices DDD (Domain-Driven Design), TDD, hexagonal architecture, and agile methodologies. He sets up CI/CD pipelines with quality analysis, E2E testing with Cucumber and Playwright, and systematic code reviews.
responses.frontend: On the front-end, Lounes is proficient in TypeScript, Angular, React, Next.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Storybook, and Ionic. He has strong expertise in Angular and NX monorepo architecture.
responses.backend: On the back-end, Lounes works with Node.js, NestJS, Java, Express, REST API, and GraphQL. He has led ORM migrations and the implementation of server-side hexagonal architectures.
responses.saas: Lounes has contributed to numerous SaaS platforms: process monitoring at Tessi, compensation funds at GLOBAZ SA, cash management at Agicap, appointment booking at MyGladys, and laboratory digitization at Ubilab.
responses.leadership: Lounes currently leads a team of 6 developers at Tessi. He was Technical Lead at MyGladys and Ubilab, and Head of Production at Louis Vuitton. He excels at mentoring and upskilling teams.
responses.globaz: At GLOBAZ SA (Nov 2022 - Apr 2023), Lounes developed a SaaS solution for Swiss compensation funds. He set up NX, continuous delivery, a design system, and trained teams in OOP and data structures.
responses.mygladys: At MyGladys (Dec 2018 - Nov 2019), Lounes was Technical Lead Fullstack. SaaS platform for professional appointment booking. He created a user tracker, led API communication using OOP, and developed the client calendar.
responses.ubilab: At Ubilab (Sep 2016 - Dec 2018), Lounes was Technical Lead Frontend. SaaS platform for digitizing laboratories and clinics. He built the e-learning module from scratch and set up the CI/CD pipeline.
responses.trainme: At TrainMe (Feb 2016 - Jul 2016), mobile development internship. Hybrid Ionic application for sport digitization, real-time messaging, and calendar for sports professionals.
